text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying ADA Title II Compliance 2026 to a concrete case.

section.title: 75,000-pop city portal

example.code:
# City of Example — ADA Title II Conformance
Population bucket: >=50k → Deadline 2026-04-24. WCAG target: 2.1 AA.
Scope: 14 public-facing services (portal, permits, payments, transit info). Audit: 2026-03-15 (accessibility-evaluation v1.1.0), 12 findings — 3 critical, 5 high, 4 medium. Gap remediation ETA: 2026-04-15 (all critical+high closed before deadline). Third-party scope: payment widget contract amended Q1 2026 to require 2.1 AA.

section.note: Report states bucket, deadline, target, scope, audit evidence, and remediation timeline — all five conformance criteria met.
